Dealer partners

"At The Towbar Guys, we're proud of the quality work we deliver and the customer service we provide long after the job is done. Every installation is treated as if it were on our own vehicle."

Why partner with us?

Your customers are already asking about towbars. When they buy an SUV, ute, or wagon, towing capability is a key decision driver. By partnering with us, you capture that demand directly — offering a ready-to-tow solution at the point of sale.

New revenue stream

Earn a referral fee or margin on every towbar fitment your customers choose.

Trusted reputation

4.9 stars on Google. Quality and care your customers will notice.

Quality & aftersales

Every job is ADR compliant, insured, and covered by our workmanship warranty.

Our installation services
📍 Servicing all of Victoria

We fit all major towbar types across virtually every make and model sold in Australia. Certified technicians, mobile fit-up available state-wide.

Heavy duty towbars

Permanent heavy-duty towing. Rated up to 3,500kg braked. Ideal for utes, SUVs, and wagons.

European style towbars

Swan neck or detachable designs — maintains vehicle aesthetics when not towing.

Wiring & electrics

7-pin and 12-pin trailer wiring, bypass relays, brake controllers — vehicle-specific harnesses when applicable.

Bike & accessory carriers

Platform carriers, bike racks, cargo platforms — just a receiver hitch or ball.

Compliance certification

All installations ADR compliant with full documentation provided per vehicle.

Fleet & volume fitting

Discounted rates for high-volume dealerships. Priority scheduling. Across Victoria (conditions apply).

Partnership models

Flexible arrangements to suit your dealership — from simple referrals to fully branded in-house accessory programs. Currently with 5 Victorian dealerships and growing.

How the partnership works

From first conversation to first install, most Victorian dealerships are live within two weeks.

1

Initial conversation with Pedro

We meet with your sales, F&I, or accessories manager to understand your customer mix and monthly volume.

2

Tailored proposal & agreement

We structure a partnership and pricing schedule specific to your dealership. No lock-in contracts.

3

Team onboarding

A 30-minute briefing with your sales team — what to offer, how to quote, and how to refer.

4

Go live

Customers receive towbar quotes through your team. We handle booking, fitting (2–3 weeks), and aftersales.

5

Ongoing support

Monthly reporting, regular check-ins with Pedro, and a dedicated contact for any aftersales matters.

Ready to explore a partnership?

Get in touch with Pedro directly. We'll walk you through the numbers for your location and vehicle mix — no obligation.
